author: emergent-company
description: Semantic strategy runtime schema — section-level strategy artifacts as graph nodes with structural, semantic, and causal edges. Auto-managed by epf-cli.
name: epf-engine

objectTypes.description: An EPF YAML artifact file. Parent node for section-level objects extracted from this file.

objectTypes.name: Artifact

inertia_tier.description: Inertia tier based on artifact type

phase.description: EPF phase: READY, FIRE, or AIM

objectTypes.description: Unstructured evidence from AIM/evidence/ — competitive intelligence, partner context, technical data, market analysis. Not authoritative — supplements formal EPF artifacts for AIM processes.
objectTypes.label: Reference Document
objectTypes.name: ReferenceDocument

category.description: Evidence category: competitive, partner, technical, market, narrative, product-specs, internal

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash for change detection during sync

description.description: Brief summary or first line of the document

file_format.description: File format: md, pdf, docx, html

inertia_tier.description: Inertia tier (1-7) in the EPF hierarchy

source_artifact.description: Path to the source YAML file

objectTypes.description: An AI agent persona that orchestrates EPF workflows.

objectTypes.name: Agent

agent_type.description: Type: guide, strategist, specialist, architect, reviewer

objectTypes.label: Skill
objectTypes.name: Skill

skill_type.description: Type: creation, generation, review, enrichment, analysis

relationshipTypes.description: An artifact contains a section-level object, or a feature contains capabilities/scenarios
relationshipTypes.label: Contains
relationshipTypes.name: contains

relationshipTypes.description: A feature contributes value to a value model component
relationshipTypes.label: Contributes To
relationshipTypes.name: contributes_to

relationshipTypes.description: An OKR targets advancement of a value model component
relationshipTypes.label: Targets
relationshipTypes.name: targets

relationshipTypes.description: A feature serves a specific persona
relationshipTypes.label: Serves
relationshipTypes.name: serves

relationshipTypes.description: A feature depends on another feature
relationshipTypes.label: Depends On
relationshipTypes.name: depends_on

relationshipTypes.description: A feature or OKR tests a riskiest assumption
relationshipTypes.label: Tests Assumption
relationshipTypes.name: tests_assumption

relationshipTypes.description: An agent requires or uses a skill
relationshipTypes.label: Uses Skill
relationshipTypes.name: uses_skill

relationshipTypes.description: An OKR delivers or advances a feature
relationshipTypes.label: Delivers
relationshipTypes.name: delivers

relationshipTypes.description: Two features share contributes_to paths to the same value model component
relationshipTypes.label: Shared Technology
relationshipTypes.name: shared_technology

relationshipTypes.description: A cross-track dependency converges at a KR
relationshipTypes.label: Converges At
relationshipTypes.name: converges_at

relationshipTypes.description: A mapping artifact implements a value model component
relationshipTypes.label: Implements
relationshipTypes.name: implements

relationshipTypes.description: A strategic phase follows another phase in sequence
relationshipTypes.label: Follows
relationshipTypes.name: follows

relationshipTypes.description: A track definition is related to another definition (requires, enables, follows)
relationshipTypes.label: Related Definition
relationshipTypes.name: related_definition

relationship.description: Relationship type: requires, enables, follows, parallel, alternative

relationshipTypes.description: A positioning claim references a specific competitor
relationshipTypes.label: Competes With
relationshipTypes.name: competes_with

relationshipTypes.description: A feature or capability mitigates a threat or strategic risk
relationshipTypes.label: Mitigates
relationshipTypes.name: mitigates

relationshipTypes.description: A feature leverages an organizational strength
relationshipTypes.label: Leverages
relationshipTypes.name: leverages

relationshipTypes.description: A feature targets a market segment
relationshipTypes.label: Targets Segment
relationshipTypes.name: targets_segment

relationshipTypes.description: A proven capability validates a problem-solution hypothesis
relationshipTypes.label: Validates Hypothesis
relationshipTypes.name: validates_hypothesis

evidence.description: Evidence from the capability supporting validation

relationshipTypes.description: A feature addresses a market gap / white space
relationshipTypes.label: Addresses White Space
relationshipTypes.name: addresses_white_space

relationshipTypes.description: One node semantically supports or reinforces another
relationshipTypes.label: Supports
relationshipTypes.name: supports

relationshipTypes.description: One node semantically contradicts another
relationshipTypes.label: Contradicts
relationshipTypes.name: contradicts

relationshipTypes.description: One node provides more detail for another
relationshipTypes.label: Elaborates
relationshipTypes.name: elaborates

relationshipTypes.description: Two nodes express similar concepts in different contexts
relationshipTypes.label: Parallels
relationshipTypes.name: parallels

relationshipTypes.description: A higher-tier node informs a lower-tier node (Belief → Positioning)
relationshipTypes.label: Informs
relationshipTypes.name: informs

relationshipTypes.description: Proven capability validates an assumption
relationshipTypes.label: Validates
relationshipTypes.name: validates

evidence.description: Evidence from the capability supporting validation

relationshipTypes.description: AIM evidence invalidates a belief or assumption
relationshipTypes.label: Invalidates
relationshipTypes.name: invalidates

relationshipTypes.description: An assumption constrains a feature (reverse of tests_assumption)
relationshipTypes.label: Constrains
relationshipTypes.name: constrains
